# libredash admin

Administrative utilities

## Usage

```sh
libredash admin
```

## Subcommands

- `libredash backup`: Create a consistent LibreDash instance backup
- `libredash bootstrap`: Bootstrap an owner principal and API token
- `libredash maintenance`: Prune bounded operational history
- `libredash restore`: Restore LibreDash from a validated instance backup
- `libredash storage`: Maintain analytical storage
